meaning: n.{鍐皚(鍒掑垎鍐扮悆鍦烘垚3涓潎绛夊尯鍩熺殑)钃濈嚎
examples: Led by Corey Neilson and Bruce Richardson, new signings Dominic D'Amour and Stephen Lee were joined on the blueline by Tom Norton.
Kirk Maltby took a pass from Draper at his own blueline and went end-to-end, beating Irbe with a high wrist shot from the face-off circle.
